beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich  and Juventus  have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Chelsea - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Stuttgart vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Stuttgart vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: This is the first ever meeting between Stuttgart and FC Porto – the German side last faced a Portuguese side in Europe in the last 32 of the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League, losing both legs to Benfica. FC Porto have won their last three major European matches against German sides – two wins against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League in October 2022 and a 2-0 win against Hoffenheim in October 2024 in the Europa League.

beIN SPORTS 3.title: Atalanta vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall  and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc: ONE Championship returns on March 13, live from Bangkok’s Lumpinee Stadium in U.S. primetime. In the main event, lightweight Muay Thai contenders Sinsamut Klinmee and George Jarvis meet in a key bout with World Title implications. In the co-main event, Tye Ruotolo defends the ONE Welterweight Submission Grappling World Title against Pawel Jaworski. The card also features John Lineker, Supergirl, and Hyu Iwata.
